conceptualization_details.theme_description: Explore the lush, dense layers of tropical foliage.
conceptualization_details.technique_approach: Start by applying a series of wet-on-wet techniques to create a base of varied greens and blues that spread slightly into each other, mimicking the unpredictable nature of a tropical forest. Building layers from dark tones to lighter tones will add depth and complexity. Speckles of yellow and white can represent sunlight filtering through dense leaves. Intermittent small, bright watercolor blooming effects can mimic flowers or unusual foliage. No outlines will be used to keep the focus on the interaction of colors and the implicit form of the foliage.
